goal: Ship v8.3 operator acceptance evidence visibility.
risk: AOF claims operator acceptance while Mission Control still hides the feedback summary or evidence path in raw JSON.
loss_boundary: No v8.3 release claim unless Mission Control shows acceptance state, governance action, and evidence refs from operator-validation-audit.
acceptance_gates: operator-validation-audit public records include human-readable evidence
Mission Control projection and viewer expose operator acceptance evidence
evidence_plan: schema, viewer, focused tests, release-state audit, Council review
stop_conditions: stop if acceptance state is count-only
